brief: U.S. immigration enforcement intensifies with a fatal ICE shooting in Maine, while Trump reinstates an Iran port blockade. In research, papers explore AI coding assistants and wearable sensing systems. Lindsey Graham's sister is appointed to his Senate seat.
news_summary: Top stories include the fatal ICE shooting of a Colombian man in Maine, Trump reinstating the Iran port blockade with a 20% cargo charge, and Lindsey Graham's sister appointed to his Senate term.
papers_summary: Research highlights include configurable AI coding assistants, behavioral probing in mandatory wearable sensing, and a study on AI in crime linkage.

en.brief: U.S. immigration enforcement intensifies with a fatal ICE shooting in Maine, while Trump reinstates an Iran port blockade. In research, papers explore AI coding assistants and wearable sensing systems. Lindsey Graham's sister is appointed to his Senate seat.
en.news_summary: Top stories include the fatal ICE shooting of a Colombian man in Maine, Trump reinstating the Iran port blockade with a 20% cargo charge, and Lindsey Graham's sister appointed to his Senate term.
en.papers_summary: Research highlights include configurable AI coding assistants, behavioral probing in mandatory wearable sensing, and a study on AI in crime linkage.

zh.brief: 今日主要新闻包括曼谷酒吧大火致27死、台风巴威横扫华东、美国参议员格雷厄姆去世。研究方面关注AI编程助手和可穿戴传感系统。
zh.news_summary: 曼谷酒吧大火造成27人死亡，目击者描述逃生经历；台风巴威先登陆浙江后北移，河北洪水冲走车辆；美国参议员格雷厄姆去世，其妹被任命接替任期。特朗普政府重启伊朗港口封锁并拟对霍尔木兹海峡货物征收20%费用。
zh.papers_summary: 多项研究探讨AI编程助手的可控性、高 stakes 环境下可穿戴传感的行为探测、以及可视化分析中缺失数据处理等问题。

todays_image.caption: A pair of federal handcuffs, meant to restrain, mirrors the tragic end of a 35-year pursuit of freedom under the weight of federal enforcement.
todays_image.title: Federal Air Marshal's Handcuffs
